description: Update the pricing and availability of specific products in the Urban Electronics store to meet new Q2 requirements. Set the price of 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' (SKU: SONY-WH1000XM5) to $329.99 and 'Logitech MX Master 3S' (SKU: LOGI-MXM3S) to $79.99. Unpublish the discontinued 'Bose QuietComfort 45' (SKU: BOSE-QC45) from the storefront without deleting it.
